professionalSummary: Data Scientist with a strong foundation in Python, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. Top 10 finalist in the Pupilica AI Hackathon, with demonstrated ability to integrate AI APIs into production-ready applications. Focused on Natural Language Processing (NLP) and scalable data solutions, with hands-on experience in model training, quantization, and edge AI deployment.

experiences.title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Developed an "Apple Detection and Quality Analysis System" using YOLOv8-seg for real-time fruit detection and CIEDE2000 color quality analysis.
Designed and implemented a desktop GUI with PyQt5, integrating camera SDK, ML inference, and physical dimension measurement modules.
Trained and deployed computer vision models on embedded devices for real-time edge AI inference.
Gained hands-on experience in data preprocessing, model evaluation, and the practical challenges of edge computing.

references.name: Asst. Prof. Dr. Nilgün ŞENGÖZ
references.title: Postdoctoral Researcher, Computer Science, University of Nottingham
references.company: Dept. of Information Systems & Technologies, MAKU, Turkiye
